articles.title: NT debt to hit $12.55b as budget delivers no new cost of living relief
articles.excerpt: The Northern Territory's debt is set to climb to $12.55 billion next financial year, as the 2026-27 budget delivers record spending on health and crime prevention without providing any new cost of living relief.
articles.content: The Northern Territory's debt is set to climb to $12.55 billion next financial year, as the 2026-27 budget delivers record spending on health and crime prevention without providing any new cost of living relief.
articles.author: Roxanne Fitzgerald

articles.title: 'She needs to go': Calls for Margot McNeill to resign from CIT
articles.excerpt: Canberra Insititute of Technology's chief executive Margot McNeill is under pressure to resign, after the ACT Legislative Assembly released a damning report which found she misled the institute's board.
articles.content: Canberra Insititute of Technology's chief executive Margot McNeill is under pressure to resign, after the ACT Legislative Assembly released a damning report which found she misled the institute's board.
